task_text: agent-33-birthday-v0-1-with-cli-write — Agent #33 v0.1 (Loyalty & Punch-Card minimum viable). Option C pivot per user 2026-05-10 + plan-review BLOCKERs. Combines: (1) read-side birthday section in send-daily-brief (BriefSection extension + helpers + template patch + schemas), (2) operator-facing record-customer-birthday CLI write script (lock-aware atomic_write_json, no LLM/dispatcher integration), (3) all R2 plan-review BLOCKERs fixed (Literal[1] schema_version pin, MM-DD field_validator for valid dates, race resolved by CLI script using safe_io.atomic_write_json), (4) LoyaltyConfig as Tier-2 scaffold (default enabled=False) plugged into Config properly. WhatsApp owner-command integration + punch-card/points + auto-greeting deferred to v0.2; tracking items added to tasks/todo.md.
